text.title: Codebase RAG with Symbol-Boundary Chunking Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: audit-repo
step.action: Detect languages; pick AST parser per language.
step.decision-gate: If no AST parser for dominant lang, STOP and apply skip rule.

step.name: index-build
step.action: Walk repo; emit chunks; embed; insert into vector store.

step.name: eval-recall
step.decision-gate: If recall < threshold, tune padding / fallback.
